title: Misichao Stainless Steel Snack Boxes with 4 Compartments | Reusable Snack Containers Small Bento Lunch Box for Kids Adults Divided Meal Prep Containers for School Work and Travel 2 Pack
features: Reusable Divided Snack Containers - The small 4-compartment stainless steel food container is made of food-grade 18/8 stainless steel with a BPA FREE lid. Sturdy, Eco-friendly, Long-last and Stackable. We can use reusable metal food containers to replace the disposable. Reducing waste, saving time and money.

Snack Box with Compartments - Misichao snack box has 4 compartments, each holding up to 100ml of food, divided food containers allow you to eat just the perfect amount of fruits and veggies, healthy snacks and dipping sauces, and keep healthy food habits, healthy eating, balanced diet.

Compact & Stackable Portion Control Containers - Small metal lunch snack boxes sets can meet the different needs of any place and at any time. They can be stacked in each other, space-saving when you don't use them. Keep the kitchen organized and free up more storage space. It can be used anywhere such as for the kitchen, school, office, hiking, gym or other outdoor events.

Multipurpose Food Containers - These stainless steel snack containers can be used for everything that you need! Perfect for separating a variety of snacks, baby food or other small items. Such as fruits bits, cream cheese, oatmeal, crackers, sunflower seeds, dried cranberries, veggies, sauces, condiments, dips and nuts. The perfect bento snack boxes for packing healthy, nutritious snacks for kids and adults alike!

Package List - 2 x Snack Boxes. From food storage containers to lunch snack containers, our food container with lid can be used for everything that you need! Eco-friendly food prep containers will make your life better. The reusable snack containers set are easy to clean in the dishwasher. Refrigerator, Freezer friendly. Not to be used in a microwave oven.
description: Product Description Stainless Steel Snack Boxes with 4 Compartments Previous page 4 Compartments Snack Containers Get It Now Next page Multi-functional container - ideal for meal prepping, packing lunches, storing snacks, leftovers, preparing the salad, fresh ingredients, packing lunch to office/school, and food on the go. Perfect for prep meals at home and bringing them to work, school or the gym, travel and more. Snack Boxes with 4 Compartments Reusable Divided Snack Containers Divided food boxes allow you to eat just the right amount of fruit and vegetables, healthy snacks and dips, and maintain healthy eating habits, a healthy diet, and a balanced diet.
